description: Body language & communication coaching app using Hollywood movie clips

active_tasks.description: Configure environment variables, run DB migrations, seed, deploy to Vercel

blockers.description: DATABASE_URL not set — Prisma cannot connect to Neon
blockers.resolution: Create Neon project, add DATABASE_URL and DIRECT_URL to .env.local, then: npm run db:push && npm run db:seed

blockers.description: OPENAI_API_KEY not set — AI feedback will fail
BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN not set — recording upload will fail
blockers.resolution: Create Vercel Blob store, add BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN to .env.local

resolved.description: YouTube video IDs — all 15 verified via YouTube Data API v3

code_fixes.description: GPT-4o Vision requires images not video. Fixed: RecordClient.tsx now captures JPEG frames during recording via Canvas API. sessions/route.ts uploads frames to Vercel Blob. feedback/route.ts uses frame URLs for Vision analysis instead of webm URL.

items_completed: P0: split view already present in record/page.tsx
P0: GPT-4o Vision bug fixed — frame capture pipeline
P2: ClipCard play button hover overlay
P2: ClipCard duration badge moved to thumbnail
ui_polish.build: clean — 0 TypeScript errors, 0 Next.js build errors
